patch isn't clean 


Patching file net-mgmt/send/Makefile using Plan A...  Hunk #1 failed at 
24.  Hunk #2 succeeded at 19 with fuzz 1 (offset -32 lines).  1 out of 2 
hunks failed--saving rejects to net-mgmt/send/Makefile.rej Hmm...  The 
next patch looks like a unified diff to me...  The text leading up to 
this was: -------------------------- |Index: 
net-mgmt/send/files/extra-patch-include_pkixip__ext__asn.h 
|=================================================================== 
|RCS file: net-mgmt/send/files/extra-patch-include_pkixip__ext__asn.h 
|diff -N net-mgmt/send/files/extra-patch-include_pkixip__ext__asn.h |--- 
net-mgmt/send/files/extra-patch-include_pkixip__ext__asn.h 17 Oct 2007 
11:06:46 -0000      1.1 |+++ /dev/null  1 Jan 1970 00:00:00 -0000

as example, a lot fails, please update and give me a new patch.thx
